arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Summer transfer confirmed for Sporting CP striker
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has signalled his intention to leave Sporting CP in the summer, putting a number of Premier League clubs on high alert. Gyokeres has become one of the most coveted strikers ahead of the transfer window thanks to his prolific scoring exploits in Lisbon over the course of 18 months, but particularly this season.

arts.ttl: Man United-linked Viktor Gyokeres makes Sporting transfer decision ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer target Viktor Gyokeres reportedly makes a major decision over his Sporting Lisbon future ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: Casa Pia vs. Sporting Lisbon - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Casa Pia and Sporting Lisbon, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
